name: zea
description: Scans a software repository and produces an Architecture Knowledge Graph (AKG) with every service, API, database, event stream, and infrastructure component. Outputs structured JSON and a standalone 3D HTML visualization.
author: Zealous Engineering

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Full analysis: repository inventory, architecture graph, and HTML visualization

commands.name: graph
commands.description: Build the Architecture Knowledge Graph only (no HTML)

commands.name: report
commands.description: Generate a human-readable Markdown architecture report

outputs.description: Detected languages, frameworks, package managers, and documentation files
Full Architecture Knowledge Graph: nodes (services, APIs, databases, events, infra) and directed edges with evidence

schema.nodes: Array of {id, type, name, metadata, evidence[]}

outputs.description: Standalone interactive 3D visualization (Three.js). No server required — open directly in a browser.

capabilities: Detects languages: Python, TypeScript, Go, Java, Rust, Ruby, C#, PHP
Detects frameworks: FastAPI, Django, Express, Spring Boot, Rails, NestJS, Laravel
Infers microservices, workers, API gateways, and monoliths
Maps REST, GraphQL, gRPC, and webhook API surfaces
Identifies databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, DynamoDB, Elasticsearch
Traces messaging: Kafka, RabbitMQ, SQS, SNS with publisher/consumer relationships
Extracts domain events with producer-consumer topology
Detects Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, Helm, and CI/CD infrastructure
Identifies external integrations: Stripe, Salesforce, Auth0, Twilio, and others
All inferences cite evidence: file paths, patterns matched, confidence scores
suggested_prompts: Run ZEA on this repo and tell me what services exist
What databases does the Order Service use?
Which services publish events and which consume them?
Are there any orphaned services (no inbound dependencies)?
What external integrations does this codebase use?
Trace the dependency chain from the API gateway to the database
